name: Instructor
description: Gets structured, validated outputs from LLMs using Pydantic models — type-safe extraction with automatic retries across 15+ providers. 6M+ monthly downloads, 13k+ GitHub stars. MIT-licensed.

skills.name: Structured Extraction
skills.description: Extracts data into typed Pydantic models from LLM responses, guaranteeing the shape your code expects.

skills.name: Automatic Retries
skills.description: Re-prompts the model on validation failures until the output conforms to the requested schema.

skills.name: Multi-Provider Support
skills.description: Works across 15+ LLM providers with one consistent API for structured, validated responses.
